relations.evidence: navigate to Time Off app --> Configuration
Configuration --> Public Holidays
All currently configured public holidays appear in a default list view. Click the New button
Enter the following information... Name: Enter the name of the holiday.
Enter the following information... Company: If in a multi-company database
Enter the following information... Start Date: Using the date and time picker
Enter the following information... End Date: Using the date and time picker
Enter the following information... Working Hours
Enter the following information... Work Entry Type
The start time is set according to the start time for the company (according to the working schedules)
the time is set to the end time for the company (according to the working schedules)
Work Entry Type: If using the **Payroll** app
this field defines how the work entries for the holiday appear
If the holiday should only apply to employees who have a specific set of working hours
Click the New button
These can be configured to be company-wide
or department specific.

the mandatory day applies to the entire company
